activeRollouts.description: Phase 3 guided first-session briefing state for new users (<=1 tracked company and account age under 48 hours), with deterministic 50/50 rollout by user id hash.
activeRollouts.rollbackPath: Set FF_BRIEFING_FIRST_SESSION_GUIDED_BRIEFING=off to return all users to the full briefing layout.

activeRollouts.description: Harden Playwright base URL fallback and deterministic signup consent in CI synthetic tests
